title: Savory Sweet Malaysian Chicken Tagine
description: A salty and light Malaysian dish featuring chicken, flour tortilla, and coconut cream, cooked in a traditional tajine clay vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil in the bottom of a tajine clay vessel over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Add the cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the coconut cream and stir to combine.
Cover the tajine with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Cook for 30 minutes, then remove the lid and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook the flour tortilla strips in a dry skillet over medium heat until they are crispy.
Serve the chicken and sauce over the crispy tortilla strips.
